{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4842195278606858022

  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, Optional\r\n\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobEvent, JobState\r\n\r\n\r\nclass InvalidStateTransition(Exception):\r\n    pass\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def _record_event(\r\n    session: AsyncSession,\r\n    job: Job,\r\n    old: Optional[JobState],\r\n    new: JobState,\r\n    message: str,\r\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    event = JobEvent(\r\n        job_id=job.id,\r\n        old_state=old,\r\n        new_state=new,\r\n        message=message,\r\n        metadata=metadata or {},\r\n    )\r\n    session.add(event)\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def transition_state(\r\n    session: AsyncSession,\r\n    job: Job,\r\n    new_state: JobState,\r\n    message: str,\r\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Validate and perform a state transition, recording a JobEvent.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    old = job.state\r\n\r\n    if not _is_valid_transition(old, new_state):\r\n        raise InvalidStateTransition(f\"Cannot transition {old} -> {new_state}\")\r\n\r\n    job.state = new_state\r\n    job.updated_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\r\n    await _record_event(session, job, old, new_state, message, metadata)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _is_valid_transition(old: JobState, new: JobState) -> bool:\r\n    if old == new:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old == JobState.QUEUED and new in {\r\n        JobState.RUNNING,\r\n        JobState.CANCELED,\r\n        JobState.DEAD,\r\n    }:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old == JobState.RUNNING and new in {\r\n        JobState.SUCCEEDED,\r\n        JobState.FAILED,\r\n        JobState.CANCELED,\r\n        JobState.DEAD,\r\n    }:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old in {JobState.FAILED, JobState.DEAD} and new == JobState.QUEUED:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    # Terminal states remain terminal\r\n    if old in {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.CANCELED}:\r\n        return False\r\n\r\n    return False\r\n\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "cae62fc7dba445521fbef723caf77da002cdc84623129348efb2e83f46f89b3d",

      },

        {

        },

          "1:LEN": "."

    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport asyncio\r\nimport signal\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List\r\n\r\nimport yaml\r\nfrom prometheus_client import start_http_server\r\nfrom sqlalchemy import and_, select\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom .broker import enqueue_job, update_queue_depth\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\nfrom .db import get_session_factory, init_db\r\nfrom .logging import configure_logging, get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobState, ScheduleTick\r\nfrom .state_machine import transition_state\r\n \r\n \r\n logger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"scheduler\")\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class RecurringSchedule:\r\n     id: str\r\n     job_type: str\r\n     queue: str\r\n     interval_seconds: int\r\n     max_attempts: int\r\n     payload: Dict[str, Any]\r\n \r\n \r\n def load_schedules(path: Path) -> List[RecurringSchedule]:\r\n     if not path.exists():\r\n         return []\r\n     raw = yaml.safe_load(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")) or {}\r\n     out: List[RecurringSchedule] = []\r\n     for item in raw.get(\"schedules\", []):\r\n         out.append(\r\n             RecurringSchedule(\r\n                 id=str(item[\"id\"]),\r\n                 job_type=str(item[\"job_type\"]),\r\n                 queue=str(item.get(\"queue\", \"default\")),\r\n                 interval_seconds=int(item.get(\"interval_seconds\", 60)),\r\n                 max_attempts=int(item.get(\"max_attempts\", 3)),\r\n                 payload=dict(item.get(\"payload\", {})),\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n     return out\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _enqueue_due_jobs(session: AsyncSession, now: datetime) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Enqueue delayed/retry jobs whose next_run_at is due.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     stmt = (\r\n         select(Job)\r\n         .where(\r\n             and_(\r\n                 Job.state == JobState.QUEUED,\r\n                 Job.is_enqueued.is_(False),\r\n                 Job.next_run_at.is_not(None),\r\n                 Job.next_run_at <= now,\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n         .with_for_update(skip_locked=True)\r\n     )\r\n     result = await session.execute(stmt)\r\n     jobs: List[Job] = list(result.scalars())\r\n     for job in jobs:\r\n         await enqueue_job(\r\n             job_id=job.id,\r\n             job_type=job.type,\r\n             queue=job.queue,\r\n             idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n         )\r\n         job.is_enqueued = True\r\n         job.next_run_at = None\r\n         await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Scheduler enqueued delayed job\")\r\n         SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL.labels(schedule_id=\"delayed\").inc()\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _enqueue_recurring(\r\n     session: AsyncSession,\r\n     schedules: List[RecurringSchedule],\r\n     now: datetime,\r\n ) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Enqueue recurring jobs based on config file schedules.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     for sched in schedules:\r\n         # Compute the current tick's planned_time by flooring now to interval.\r\n         seconds = int(now.timestamp())\r\n         tick_start = seconds - (seconds % sched.interval_seconds)\r\n         planned = datetime.fromtimestamp(tick_start, tz=timezone.utc)\r\n \r\n         # Check if this tick already exists.\r\n         stmt = select(ScheduleTick).where(\r\n             and_(\r\n                 ScheduleTick.schedule_id == sched.id,\r\n                 ScheduleTick.planned_time == planned,\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n         exists = (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\r\n         if exists:\r\n             continue\r\n \r\n         tick = ScheduleTick(schedule_id=sched.id, planned_time=planned)\r\n         session.add(tick)\r\n         await session.flush()\r\n \r\n         # Create a new job row for this schedule.\r\n         job = Job(\r\n             type=sched.job_type,\r\n             queue=sched.queue,\r\n             payload=sched.payload,\r\n             max_attempts=sched.max_attempts,\r\n             state=JobState.QUEUED,\r\n             is_enqueued=False,\r\n             next_run_at=now,\r\n             schedule=sched.id,\r\n             idempotency_key=f\"{sched.id}:{planned.isoformat()}\",\r\n         )\r\n         session.add(job)\r\n         await session.flush()\r\n \r\n         await enqueue_job(\r\n             job_id=job.id,\r\n             job_type=job.type,\r\n             queue=job.queue,\r\n             idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n         )\r\n         job.is_enqueued = True\r\n         await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Scheduler enqueued recurring job\")\r\n         SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL.labels(schedule_id=sched.id).inc()\r\n \r\n \r\n async def scheduler_loop(schedules: List[RecurringSchedule]) -> None:\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     factory = get_session_factory()\r\n     queue = settings.queue_default\r\n \r\n     while True:\r\n         now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\r\n         async with factory() as session:\r\n             async with session.begin():\r\n                 await _enqueue_due_jobs(session, now)\r\n                 await _enqueue_recurring(session, schedules, now)\r\n         try:\r\n             await update_queue_depth(queue)\r\n         except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n             logger.exception(\"Failed to update queue depth\")\r\n         await asyncio.sleep(settings.scheduler_interval_sec)\r\n \r\n \r\n async def main() -> None:\r\n     configure_logging(service=\"scheduler\")\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n \r\n     # Prometheus metrics server for scheduler.\r\n     start_http_server(settings.metrics_port)\r\n \r\n     await init_db()\r\n \r\n     config_path = Path(\"config\") / \"schedules.yml\"\r\n     schedules = load_schedules(config_path)\r\n     logger.info(\"Loaded schedules\", extra={\"count\": len(schedules)})\r\n \r\n     stop_event = asyncio.Event()\r\n \r\n     loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\r\n     for sig in (signal.SIGINT, signal.SIGTERM):\r\n         loop.add_signal_handler(sig, stop_event.set)\r\n \r\n     task = asyncio.create_task(scheduler_loop(schedules))\r\n \r\n     await stop_event.wait()\r\n     task.cancel()\r\n     await asyncio.gather(task, return_exceptions=True)\r\n \r\n \r\n if __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n     asyncio.run(main())\r\n \r\n"
        },

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport enum\r\nimport uuid\r\nfrom datetime import datetime\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, Optional\r\n\r\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, Boolean, DateTime, Enum, ForeignKey, Integer, String, Text, UniqueConstraint\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase, Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\r\n\r\n\r\nclass Base(DeclarativeBase):  # type: ignore[misc]\r\n    pass\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobState(str, enum.Enum):\r\n    QUEUED = \"QUEUED\"\r\n    RUNNING = \"RUNNING\"\r\n    SUCCEEDED = \"SUCCEEDED\"\r\n    FAILED = \"FAILED\"\r\n    CANCELED = \"CANCELED\"\r\n    DEAD = \"DEAD\"\r\n \r\n \r\n class Job(Base):\r\n     __tablename__ = \"jobs\"\r\n \r\n     id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\r\n         String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\r\n     )\r\n     type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=False)\r\n     queue: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), default=\"default\")\r\n \r\n     payload: Mapped[Dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     state: Mapped[JobState] = mapped_column(\r\n         Enum(JobState), default=JobState.QUEUED, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n     updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     idempotency_key: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(128), nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=0, nullable=False)\r\n     max_attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=3, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     next_run_at: Mapped[Optional[datetime]] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     schedule: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(128), nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     last_error: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     result: Mapped[Optional[Dict[str, Any]]] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     is_enqueued: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, nullable=False)\r\n     cancel_requested: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     events: Mapped[list[\"JobEvent\"]] = relationship(\r\n         back_populates=\"job\", cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\"\r\n     )\r\n \r\n \r\n class JobEvent(Base):\r\n     __tablename__ = \"job_events\"\r\n \r\n     id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\r\n \r\n     job_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\r\n         String(36), ForeignKey(\"jobs.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"), nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     ts: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     old_state: Mapped[Optional[JobState]] = mapped_column(Enum(JobState), nullable=True)\r\n     new_state: Mapped[JobState] = mapped_column(Enum(JobState), nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     message: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     metadata: Mapped[Dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     job: Mapped[Job] = relationship(back_populates=\"events\")\r\n \r\n \r\n class ScheduleTick(Base):\r\n     __tablename__ = \"schedule_ticks\"\r\n \r\n     id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\r\n \r\n     schedule_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(128), nullable=False)\r\n     planned_time: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=False)\r\n     enqueued_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     __table_args__ = (\r\n         UniqueConstraint(\"schedule_id\", \"planned_time\", name=\"uq_schedule_tick\"),\r\n     )\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "eb73f7b88855842c811d4b76792cfde255f5aa26e5d0c9429cf723845e92525c",

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport asyncio\r\nimport time\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict\r\n\r\nimport httpx\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field, HttpUrl\r\n\r\nfrom . import TaskContext, register_task\r\n\r\n\r\nclass SleepPayload(BaseModel):\r\n    seconds: float = Field(..., gt=0)\r\n    step: float = Field(0.5, gt=0)\r\n\r\n\r\n@register_task(\"sleep\", payload_model=SleepPayload)\r\nasync def task_sleep(ctx: TaskContext, payload: SleepPayload) -> Dict[str, Any]:\r\n    remaining = payload.seconds\r\n    step = payload.step\r\n    start = time.monotonic()\r\n    while remaining > 0:\r\n        await ctx.check_canceled()\r\n        interval = min(step, remaining)\r\n        await asyncio.sleep(interval)\r\n        remaining -= interval\r\n    return {\"slept\": time.monotonic() - start}\r\n\r\n\r\nclass HttpGetPayload(BaseModel):\r\n    url: HttpUrl\r\n    timeout_seconds: float = 5.0\r\n\r\n\r\n@register_task(\"http_get\", payload_model=HttpGetPayload)\r\nasync def task_http_get(ctx: TaskContext, payload: HttpGetPayload) -> Dict[str, Any]:\r\n    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=payload.timeout_seconds) as client:\r\n        resp = await client.get(str(payload.url))\r\n    return {\r\n        \"status_code\": resp.status_code,\r\n        \"headers\": dict(resp.headers),\r\n        \"body\": resp.text[:2048],\r\n    }\r\n\r\n\r\nclass CpuBurnPayload(BaseModel):\r\n    iterations: int = Field(..., gt=0, le=5_000_000)\r\n\r\n\r\n@register_task(\"cpu_burn\", payload_model=CpuBurnPayload)\r\nasync def task_cpu_burn(ctx: TaskContext, payload: CpuBurnPayload) -> Dict[str, Any]:\r\n    total = 0\r\n    for i in range(payload.iterations):\r\n        total += (i * 3) % 7\r\n        if i % 10_000 == 0:\r\n            await ctx.check_canceled()\r\n    return {\"iterations\": payload.iterations, \"value\": total}\r\n\r\n\r\nclass FailThenSucceedPayload(BaseModel):\r\n    fail_attempts: int = Field(..., ge=1)\r\n\r\n\r\n@register_task(\"fail_then_succeed\", payload_model=FailThenSucceedPayload)\r\nasync def task_fail_then_succeed(\r\n    ctx: TaskContext, payload: FailThenSucceedPayload\r\n) -> Dict[str, Any]:\r\n    if ctx.attempt <= payload.fail_attempts:\r\n        raise RuntimeError(f\"Intentional failure on attempt {ctx.attempt}\")\r\n    return {\"succeeded_on_attempt\": ctx.attempt}\r\n\r\n\r\nclass PipelineDemoPayload(BaseModel):\r\n    url: HttpUrl\r\n    steps: int = Field(3, ge=1, le=10)\r\n\r\n\r\n@register_task(\"pipeline_demo\", payload_model=PipelineDemoPayload)\r\nasync def task_pipeline_demo(\r\n    ctx: TaskContext, payload: PipelineDemoPayload\r\n) -> Dict[str, Any]:\r\n    ctx.logger.info(\"pipeline_demo: starting\", extra={\"job_id\": ctx.job.id})\r\n\r\n    # Step 1: small sleeps with cancellation checks.\r\n    for i in range(payload.steps):\r\n        await ctx.check_canceled()\r\n        await asyncio.sleep(0.2)\r\n        ctx.logger.info(\"pipeline_demo: sleep step\", extra={\"step\": i})\r\n\r\n    # Step 2: HTTP GET\r\n    await ctx.check_canceled()\r\n    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=5.0) as client:\r\n        resp = await client.get(str(payload.url))\r\n\r\n    # Step 3: CPU-bound transformation\r\n    await ctx.check_canceled()\r\n    body_len = len(resp.text)\r\n    checksum = sum(ord(c) for c in resp.text[:1000])\r\n\r\n    return {\r\n        \"status_code\": resp.status_code,\r\n        \"body_length\": body_len,\r\n        \"checksum\": checksum,\r\n    }\r\n\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": {
          "12:I32": 1667510838,
          "12:LEN": "87380f62c307dd3608db1305e122529d087912080029f0d2663d72c",
          "6:VARINT": 98
        },
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Thu\, 05 Mar 2026 03:09:46 GMT
Vary: Origin
```

{

}
```

### SIGNATURE ###
```
http:host is localhost
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": {"1:I64": 4842195278606858022}, "2:LEN": "REDACTED", "6:VARINT": 4, "7:LEN": [{"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, Optional\r\n\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobEvent, JobState\r\n\r\n\r\nclass InvalidStateTransition(Exception):\r\n    pass\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def _record_event(\r\n    session: AsyncSession,\r\n    job: Job,\r\n    old: Optional[JobState],\r\n    new: JobState,\r\n    message: str,\r\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    event = JobEvent(\r\n        job_id=job.id,\r\n        old_state=old,\r\n        new_state=new,\r\n        message=message,\r\n        metadata=metadata or {},\r\n    )\r\n    session.add(event)\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def transition_state(\r\n    session: AsyncSession,\r\n    job: Job,\r\n    new_state: JobState,\r\n    message: str,\r\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Validate and perform a state transition, recording a JobEvent.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    old = job.state\r\n\r\n    if not _is_valid_transition(old, new_state):\r\n        raise InvalidStateTransition(f\"Cannot transition {old} -> {new_state}\")\r\n\r\n    job.state = new_state\r\n    job.updated_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\r\n    await _record_event(session, job, old, new_state, message, metadata)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _is_valid_transition(old: JobState, new: JobState) -> bool:\r\n    if old == new:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old == JobState.QUEUED and new in {\r\n        JobState.RUNNING,\r\n        JobState.CANCELED,\r\n        JobState.DEAD,\r\n    }:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old == JobState.RUNNING and new in {\r\n        JobState.SUCCEEDED,\r\n        JobState.FAILED,\r\n        JobState.CANCELED,\r\n        JobState.DEAD,\r\n    }:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old in {JobState.FAILED, JobState.DEAD} and new == JobState.QUEUED:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    # Terminal states remain terminal\r\n    if old in {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.CANCELED}:\r\n        return False\r\n\r\n    return False\r\n\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "cae62fc7dba445521fbef723caf77da002cdc84623129348efb2e83f46f89b3d", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport asyncio\r\nimport signal\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List\r\n\r\nimport yaml\r\nfrom prometheus_client import start_http_server\r\nfrom sqlalchemy import and_, select\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom .broker import enqueue_job, update_queue_depth\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\nfrom .db import get_session_factory, init_db\r\nfrom .logging import configure_logging, get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobState, ScheduleTick\r\nfrom .state_machine import transition_state\r\n \r\n \r\n logger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"scheduler\")\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class RecurringSchedule:\r\n     id: str\r\n     job_type: str\r\n     queue: str\r\n     interval_seconds: int\r\n     max_attempts: int\r\n     payload: Dict[str, Any]\r\n \r\n \r\n def load_schedules(path: Path) -> List[RecurringSchedule]:\r\n     if not path.exists():\r\n         return []\r\n     raw = yaml.safe_load(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")) or {}\r\n     out: List[RecurringSchedule] = []\r\n     for item in raw.get(\"schedules\", []):\r\n         out.append(\r\n             RecurringSchedule(\r\n                 id=str(item[\"id\"]),\r\n                 job_type=str(item[\"job_type\"]),\r\n                 queue=str(item.get(\"queue\", \"default\")),\r\n                 interval_seconds=int(item.get(\"interval_seconds\", 60)),\r\n                 max_attempts=int(item.get(\"max_attempts\", 3)),\r\n                 payload=dict(item.get(\"payload\", {})),\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n     return out\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _enqueue_due_jobs(session: AsyncSession, now: datetime) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Enqueue delayed/retry jobs whose next_run_at is due.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     stmt = (\r\n         select(Job)\r\n         .where(\r\n             and_(\r\n                 Job.state == JobState.QUEUED,\r\n                 Job.is_enqueued.is_(False),\r\n                 Job.next_run_at.is_not(None),\r\n                 Job.next_run_at <= now,\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n         .with_for_update(skip_locked=True)\r\n     )\r\n     result = await session.execute(stmt)\r\n     jobs: List[Job] = list(result.scalars())\r\n     for job in jobs:\r\n         await enqueue_job(\r\n             job_id=job.id,\r\n             job_type=job.type,\r\n             queue=job.queue,\r\n             idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n         )\r\n         job.is_enqueued = True\r\n         job.next_run_at = None\r\n         await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Scheduler enqueued delayed job\")\r\n         SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL.labels(schedule_id=\"delayed\").inc()\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _enqueue_recurring(\r\n     session: AsyncSession,\r\n     schedules: List[RecurringSchedule],\r\n     now: datetime,\r\n ) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Enqueue recurring jobs based on config file schedules.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     for sched in schedules:\r\n         # Compute the current tick's planned_time by flooring now to interval.\r\n         seconds = int(now.timestamp())\r\n         tick_start = seconds - (seconds % sched.interval_seconds)\r\n         planned = datetime.fromtimestamp(tick_start, tz=timezone.utc)\r\n \r\n         # Check if this tick already exists.\r\n         stmt = select(ScheduleTick).where(\r\n             and_(\r\n                 ScheduleTick.schedule_id == sched.id,\r\n                 ScheduleTick.planned_time == planned,\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n         exists = (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\r\n         if exists:\r\n             continue\r\n \r\n         tick = ScheduleTick(schedule_id=sched.id, planned_time=planned)\r\n         session.add(tick)\r\n         await session.flush()\r\n \r\n         # Create a new job row for this schedule.\r\n         job = Job(\r\n             type=sched.job_type,\r\n             queue=sched.queue,\r\n             payload=sched.payload,\r\n             max_attempts=sched.max_attempts,\r\n             state=JobState.QUEUED,\r\n             is_enqueued=False,\r\n             next_run_at=now,\r\n             schedule=sched.id,\r\n             idempotency_key=f\"{sched.id}:{planned.isoformat()}\",\r\n         )\r\n         session.add(job)\r\n         await session.flush()\r\n \r\n         await enqueue_job(\r\n             job_id=job.id,\r\n             job_type=job.type,\r\n             queue=job.queue,\r\n             idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n         )\r\n         job.is_enqueued = True\r\n         await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Scheduler enqueued recurring job\")\r\n         SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL.labels(schedule_id=sched.id).inc()\r\n \r\n \r\n async def scheduler_loop(schedules: List[RecurringSchedule]) -> None:\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     factory = get_session_factory()\r\n     queue = settings.queue_default\r\n \r\n     while True:\r\n         now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\r\n         async with factory() as session:\r\n             async with session.begin():\r\n                 await _enqueue_due_jobs(session, now)\r\n                 await _enqueue_recurring(session, schedules, now)\r\n         try:\r\n             await update_queue_depth(queue)\r\n         except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n             logger.exception(\"Failed to update queue depth\")\r\n         await asyncio.sleep(settings.scheduler_interval_sec)\r\n \r\n \r\n async def main() -> None:\r\n     configure_logging(service=\"scheduler\")\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n \r\n     # Prometheus metrics server for scheduler.\r\n     start_http_server(settings.metrics_port)\r\n \r\n     await init_db()\r\n \r\n     config_path = Path(\"config\") / \"schedules.yml\"\r\n     schedules = load_schedules(config_path)\r\n     logger.info(\"Loaded schedules\", extra={\"count\": len(schedules)})\r\n \r\n     stop_event = asyncio.Event()\r\n \r\n     loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\r\n     for sig in (signal.SIGINT, signal.SIGTERM):\r\n         loop.add_signal_handler(sig, stop_event.set)\r\n \r\n     task = asyncio.create_task(scheduler_loop(schedules))\r\n \r\n     await stop_event.wait()\r\n     task.cancel()\r\n     await asyncio.gather(task, return_exceptions=True)\r\n \r\n \r\n if __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n     asyncio.run(main())\r\n \r\n"}, "2:LEN": "7328eee93cce7f6acf50adc204ed4799bc23f4a0ee2d25e07af614148f10f299", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport enum\r\nimport uuid\r\nfrom datetime import datetime\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, Optional\r\n\r\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, Boolean, DateTime, Enum, ForeignKey, Integer, String, Text, UniqueConstraint\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase, Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\r\n\r\n\r\nclass Base(DeclarativeBase):  # type: ignore[misc]\r\n    pass\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobState(str, enum.Enum):\r\n    QUEUED = \"QUEUED\"\r\n    RUNNING = \"RUNNING\"\r\n    SUCCEEDED = \"SUCCEEDED\"\r\n    FAILED = \"FAILED\"\r\n    CANCELED = \"CANCELED\"\r\n    DEAD = \"DEAD\"\r\n \r\n \r\n class Job(Base):\r\n     __tablename__ = \"jobs\"\r\n \r\n     id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\r\n         String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\r\n     )\r\n     type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=False)\r\n     queue: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), default=\"default\")\r\n \r\n     payload: Mapped[Dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     state: Mapped[JobState] = mapped_column(\r\n         Enum(JobState), default=JobState.QUEUED, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n     updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     idempotency_key: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(128), nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=0, nullable=False)\r\n     max_attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=3, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     next_run_at: Mapped[Optional[datetime]] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     schedule: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(128), nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     last_error: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     result: Mapped[Optional[Dict[str, Any]]] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     is_enqueued: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, nullable=False)\r\n     cancel_requested: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     events: Mapped[list[\"JobEvent\"]] = relationship(\r\n         back_populates=\"job\", cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\"\r\n     )\r\n \r\n \r\n class JobEvent(Base):\r\n     __tablename__ = \"job_events\"\r\n \r\n     id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\r\n \r\n     job_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\r\n         String(36), ForeignKey(\"jobs.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"), nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     ts: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     old_state: Mapped[Optional[JobState]] = mapped_column(Enum(JobState), nullable=True)\r\n     new_state: Mapped[JobState] = mapped_column(Enum(JobState), nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     message: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     metadata: Mapped[Dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     job: Mapped[Job] = relationship(back_populates=\"events\")\r\n \r\n \r\n class ScheduleTick(Base):\r\n     __tablename__ = \"schedule_ticks\"\r\n \r\n     id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\r\n \r\n     schedule_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(128), nullable=False)\r\n     planned_time: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=False)\r\n     enqueued_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     __table_args__ = (\r\n         UniqueConstraint(\"schedule_id\", \"planned_time\", name=\"uq_schedule_tick\"),\r\n     )\r\n \r\n"}, "2:LEN": "eb73f7b88855842c811d4b76792cfde255f5aa26e5d0c9429cf723845e92525c", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport asyncio\r\nimport time\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict\r\n\r\nimport httpx\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field, HttpUrl\r\n\r\nfrom . import TaskContext, register_task\r\n\r\n\r\nclass SleepPayload(BaseModel):\r\n    seconds: float = Field(..., gt=0)\r\n    step: float = Field(0.5, gt=0)\r\n\r\n\r\n@register_task(\"sleep\", payload_model=SleepPayload)\r\nasync def task_sleep(ctx: TaskContext, payload: SleepPayload) -> Dict[str, Any]:\r\n    remaining = payload.seconds\r\n    step = payload.step\r\n    start = time.monotonic()\r\n    while remaining > 0:\r\n        await ctx.check_canceled()\r\n        interval = min(step, remaining)\r\n        await asyncio.sleep(interval)\r\n        remaining -= interval\r\n    return {\"slept\": time.monotonic() - start}\r\n\r\n\r\nclass HttpGetPayload(BaseModel):\r\n    url: HttpUrl\r\n    timeout_seconds: float = 5.0\r\n\r\n\r\n@register_task(\"http_get\", payload_model=HttpGetPayload)\r\nasync def task_http_get(ctx: TaskContext, payload: HttpGetPayload) -> Dict[str, Any]:\r\n    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=payload.timeout_seconds) as client:\r\n        resp = await client.get(str(payload.url))\r\n    return {\r\n        \"status_code\": resp.status_code,\r\n        \"headers\": dict(resp.headers),\r\n        \"body\": resp.text[:2048],\r\n    }\r\n\r\n\r\nclass CpuBurnPayload(BaseModel):\r\n    iterations: int = Field(..., gt=0, le=5_000_000)\r\n\r\n\r\n@register_task(\"cpu_burn\", payload_model=CpuBurnPayload)\r\nasync def task_cpu_burn(ctx: TaskContext, payload: CpuBurnPayload) -> Dict[str, Any]:\r\n    total = 0\r\n    for i in range(payload.iterations):\r\n        total += (i * 3) % 7\r\n        if i % 10_000 == 0:\r\n            await ctx.check_canceled()\r\n    return {\"iterations\": payload.iterations, \"value\": total}\r\n\r\n\r\nclass FailThenSucceedPayload(BaseModel):\r\n    fail_attempts: int = Field(..., ge=1)\r\n\r\n\r\n@register_task(\"fail_then_succeed\", payload_model=FailThenSucceedPayload)\r\nasync def task_fail_then_succeed(\r\n    ctx: TaskContext, payload: FailThenSucceedPayload\r\n) -> Dict[str, Any]:\r\n    if ctx.attempt <= payload.fail_attempts:\r\n        raise RuntimeError(f\"Intentional failure on attempt {ctx.attempt}\")\r\n    return {\"succeeded_on_attempt\": ctx.attempt}\r\n\r\n\r\nclass PipelineDemoPayload(BaseModel):\r\n    url: HttpUrl\r\n    steps: int = Field(3, ge=1, le=10)\r\n\r\n\r\n@register_task(\"pipeline_demo\", payload_model=PipelineDemoPayload)\r\nasync def task_pipeline_demo(\r\n    ctx: TaskContext, payload: PipelineDemoPayload\r\n) -> Dict[str, Any]:\r\n    ctx.logger.info(\"pipeline_demo: starting\", extra={\"job_id\": ctx.job.id})\r\n\r\n    # Step 1: small sleeps with cancellation checks.\r\n    for i in range(payload.steps):\r\n        await ctx.check_canceled()\r\n        await asyncio.sleep(0.2)\r\n        ctx.logger.info(\"pipeline_demo: sleep step\", extra={\"step\": i})\r\n\r\n    # Step 2: HTTP GET\r\n    await ctx.check_canceled()\r\n    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=5.0) as client:\r\n        resp = await client.get(str(payload.url))\r\n\r\n    # Step 3: CPU-bound transformation\r\n    await ctx.check_canceled()\r\n    body_len = len(resp.text)\r\n    checksum = sum(ord(c) for c in resp.text[:1000])\r\n\r\n    return {\r\n        \"status_code\": resp.status_code,\r\n        \"body_length\": body_len,\r\n        \"checksum\": checksum,\r\n    }\r\n\r\n"}, "2:LEN": {"12:I32": 1667510838, "12:LEN": "87380f62c307dd3608db1305e122529d087912080029f0d2663d72c", "6:VARINT": 98}, "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}]}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2
```
